summary: Phase 3 Canonical Surgical Rebuild - Orchestration Tests PASSED. All 20 tests passed covering command service orchestration (interpret, draft, execute), notification canonicalization, document/activity creation via canonical services, draft idempotency/cancellation, and verification that notification_bridge.py is eliminated.
critical_code_review_comments: command_service.py correctly routes to document_service.create_document for QUOTE/INVOICE intents
command_service.py correctly routes to activity_service.create_draft_activity for MESSAGE intent
notification_service.py is now the canonical notification module - no is_demo field in create_notification
notification_bridge.py has been successfully eliminated - no imports found in services/ or routes/
send_milestone_notification in realtime_service.py no longer takes is_demo parameter
All command endpoints (interpret, draft, execute, tools, history, drafts) return responses without is_demo
GET /api/notifications returns notifications without is_demo field
Draft idempotency works correctly - executing same draft_id twice returns cached result with already_executed=true
Draft cancellation works correctly - confirmed=false sets status to cancelled
seed_data_creation: Test data created during tests (quotes, invoices, activities via command/execute). Test agent has project_id=proj_f763e6ef3aaf and client_id=client_0d050a240d04.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Canonical Surgical Rebuild complete. Command service now acts as pure routing brain delegating to canonical Phase 1/2 services. notification_bridge.py eliminated. notification_service.py is canonical. No is_demo in orchestration path. All 3 phases (Phase 1: 33/33, Phase 2: 32/32, Phase 3: 20/20) have passed.
endpoints_tested: POST /api/command/execute (quote -> document_service, invoice -> document_service, message -> activity_service)
